tasks.task_description: Create new docs structure (vision/, requirements/, architecture/, adr/, implementation/, process/)
Move existing files to correct locations
Fix all ADR references in existing docs

description: Restructure docs to V-model with enforced workflow, create missing ADRs, add DoR/DoD
context: Created docs structure: vision/, requirements/, architecture/, adr/, implementation/, process/. Moved target-architecture.md and general-tui-design.md to architecture/
Created ADR-001 (vision), ADR-016 (TUI design), ADR-080 (theme system) with proper V-model layer references
Created acceptance-criteria.md, definition-of-done.md (with DoR/DoD), and workflow.md with enforced quality gates

Fixed all ADR references: ADR-001 in 005-interface-segregation.md, ADR-016 in general-tui-design.md (2 places), ADR-080 in 013-terminal-theme-accessibility.md. ADR-001 in general-tui-design line 78 is just example UI text, not a real reference.
